beats.what: A static shot of an empty red running track with white lane markings and empty stadium seats.
A runner in a blue shirt enters the frame from the left and runs across the track.
The runner continues sprinting across the red track towards the right side of the frame.

formal.text: An empty red running track remains unoccupied.
A runner in a blue shirt enters the frame.
The runner continues to traverse the red track.

sarcastic.text: A truly packed crowd of empty stadium seats.
And here comes the main event.

humorous_tech.text: New process initiated. High CPU usage.
Critical memory leak detected in the blue module.

humorous_non_tech.text: The stadium is ready for its big moment.
And here comes the main event!
He is definitely winning the race against nothing.
